children.text: Latin or scientific name: Matricaria chamomilla
Where it grows: Euroea and Asia
When to pick it up: At the beginning of flowering, from middle June to middle August. Picking has to be done when dew has gone and has to be stopped around midday.
Properties: Antiphlogistic, hypoallergenic, anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, hunger stimulating, painkilling, digestive, emmenagogue, antipyretic, sedative, tonic
